Establishing a Connection Between Players

When both players are online, a connection must be established between the players so that the match can begin. The player's opponent can be notified of the individual waiting to play by calling the XOnlineMessageSend function to send a game invite message. Upon receiving this message, the opponent's copy of your title calls XOnlineCompetitionCheckin to check in to the tournament. Meanwhile, the originating player's copy of your title should attempt to establish the peer-to-peer connection to the opponent using the XNKID indicated in the opponent's presence information.
